title: AWS
description: A complete path through Amazon Web Services: cloud foundations, account setup, IAM, compute, storage, networking, databases, security, monitoring, infrastructure as code, containers, serverless, application integration, DevOps and CI/CD, data analytics, machine learning, migration, cost optimization, the Well-Architected Framework, advanced multi-account and networking topics, and certifications. Roadmap updated for June 2026: Bedrock AgentCore, Nova 2, Frontier Agents, Agent Toolkit, Lambda MicroVMs/Durable Functions, S3 Tables/Vectors, FinSpace, Elemental Media, HealthLake, promoted IoT/end-user-computing/customer-engagement topics, and expanded governance, DR, and CI/CD coverage.
